interactions.description: Open the CDE registry from the Command Center CDE panel.

state.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 64.9% coverage Atlas AI GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Glossary 0 CDE Registry 17 Showing 5 of 17 CDE registry rows CDE SOURCE-OF-RECORD COLUMN OWNER RECERT STATUS Customer Identity Quality Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Recert Due Customer Profile Coverage Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Healthy Customer Stewardship Queue Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Healthy Finance Exception Review Source column unavailable Unassigned 90d Recert Due Finance Lien Risk Summary Source column unavailable finance-steward@entrada.ai 90d Healthy Status and recertification are registry metadata values. Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned. Atlas AI Grounded in Databricks Genie evidence - no raw rows read x Ask about glossary terms, CDEs, reviewers, version history, and asset associations using governed metadata. I never read raw row values. TRY ASKING ? Which CDEs are due for review? → ? What assets are linked to the selected glossary term? → ? Summarize reviewer status for critical CDEs. → ? Which glossary term has the most asset coverage? → Atlas AI uses AI. Review

errorState.skipped: real Genie provider error path is not force-triggered by the functional harness

evidenceDetail.text: QUERY EVIDENCE 4 metadata rows returned x STATEMENT 01F146BC-2C9E-1F8B-8AE0-02AF9C763758 WITH dashboard_assets AS ( SELECT asset_fqn, domain, data_product, criticality, certification, owner_count, open_work_count, is_critical, is_certified FROM `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_assets_current` WHERE table_name ILIKE '%executive%' OR table_name ILIKE '%dashboard%' OR asset_fqn ILIKE '%executive%' OR asset_fqn ILIKE '%dashboard%' ) SELECT da.asset_fqn, da.domain, da.data_product, da.criticality, da.certification, da.owner_count, da.open_work_count, da.is_critical, da.is_certified, MAX(CASE WHEN gw.status IN ('pending','open') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_open_governance_work, MAX(CASE WHEN ql.outcome IS NOT NULL AND lower(ql.outcome) NOT IN ('pass','passed','success','succeeded') AND ql.executed_at >= DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_recent_quality_issue, MAX(CASE WHEN ae.audit_id IS NOT NULL AND ae.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_recent_audit_event FROM dashboard_assets da LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_governance_work_current` gw ON da.asset_fqn = gw.asset_fqn LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_quality_

evidenceDetail.text: QUERY EVIDENCE 4 metadata rows returned x STATEMENT 01F146BC-2C9E-1F8B-8AE0-02AF9C763758 WITH dashboard_assets AS ( SELECT asset_fqn, domain, data_product, criticality, certification, owner_count, open_work_count, is_critical, is_certified FROM `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_assets_current` WHERE table_name ILIKE '%executive%' OR table_name ILIKE '%dashboard%' OR asset_fqn ILIKE '%executive%' OR asset_fqn ILIKE '%dashboard%' ) SELECT da.asset_fqn, da.domain, da.data_product, da.criticality, da.certification, da.owner_count, da.open_work_count, da.is_critical, da.is_certified, MAX(CASE WHEN gw.status IN ('pending','open') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_open_governance_work, MAX(CASE WHEN ql.outcome IS NOT NULL AND lower(ql.outcome) NOT IN ('pass','passed','success','succeeded') AND ql.executed_at >= DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_recent_quality_issue, MAX(CASE WHEN ae.audit_id IS NOT NULL AND ae.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_recent_audit_event FROM dashboard_assets da LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_governance_work_current` gw ON da.asset_fqn = gw.asset_fqn LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_quality_
